Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Chae Mon Chung, Jung Hee Chung, And James C. Hann, Esq.; Proposed Verified Answer; And [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CHAE CHUNG AND JUNG CHUNG'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is granted. Defendants have shown excusable neglect and California's strong public policy in favor of deciding cases on their merits favors granting the motion. Plaintiff's request for fees and costs are denied. Plaintiff's rush to seek entry of default and default judgment and refusal to stipulate to the reasonable request to setting them aside preclude awarding any relief to plaintiff. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
